content.en:
After obtaining the Creation Mixed Yuan Well, after Ye Tian refines it, he can directly take away this holy artifact.

However, it is not possible to take it away directly.

Because the River of Dreams is an external holy artifact form evolved from the aura of the Holy Relic of the Creation Mixed Element Well, once the Creation Mixed Element Well is taken away, the River of Dreams will disappear.

In this way, the Dream Clan will find out about the situation of the Dream River, causing the Dream Clan to definitely search at all costs, and even ask to investigate the storage space, the inner world, and all the places where treasures can be hidden on each genius's body.

When the time comes, he will not be able to hide the Creation Chaos Element Well, and it will inevitably be exposed.

It doesn't matter if his body falls, but if the Creation Mixed Yuan Well is lost, the loss will be too great, and it will be cheap for the Dream Clan.

Therefore, he must ensure that the river of dreams does not disappear anytime soon.

"Extract the power of the Creation Mixed Yuan Well, form a holy clone to stay here, and maintain the River of Dreams, when I leave the Dark Destruction Domain and the River of Dreams disappears, they won't be able to find me!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

As a result, Ye Tian began to extract the power of the holy relics of the Creation Mixed Yuan Well, and slowly formed a holy artifact clone.

"That's pretty much it!"

Ye Tian looked at the clone that had already formed the Creation Mixed Yuan Well, and had replaced the Creation Mixed Yuan Well, and nodded in his heart.

Subsequently, his consciousness enveloped the Creation Mixed Yuan Well and returned to the original body.

Silently, the Creation Mixed Yuan Well fell into Ye Tian's internal space.

As long as the Invincible Domain Ancestors did not carefully probe his body, they would hardly find the Creation Mixed Yuan Well.

Moreover, under Ye Tian's control, the aura of the Genesis Mixed Yuan Well Holy Relic was restrained, and it was difficult to discover its identity.

So, Ye Tian didn't worry about anything.

Wow!

Ye Tian left the Dream Realm, left the Dream River, and then returned to the Demon Prison Clan.

Along the way, he was not hindered in any way.

After returning to the Demon Hell Clan, Ye Tiancai breathed a sigh of relief.

At least, with his current status, there could be no danger in the Demon Hell Clan.

Ye Tian didn't stay in the Demon Hell Clan for long, because he knew very well that the River of Dreams would not be able to exist for a long time and would disappear soon.

Therefore, he must leave the Dark Destruction Domain as soon as possible, and he must leave here far away to ensure that he will not be captured by the people of the Dream Clan, otherwise, he will not be able to escape.

Soon, Ye Tian found an opportunity to leave the Demon Prison Clan with the opportunity to go out to practice.

He first trained in various places in the Dark Destruction Domain, and then directly chose to leave the Dark Destruction Domain and fly towards the Dark Forbidden Domain outside the Dark Destruction Domain area.

-------------------

As soon as he entered the Dark Forbidden Domain, Ye Tian sped up and flew towards the Dao Mountain Realm.

He has the ontology as the coordinates, and this connection almost ignores the distance, so through this connection he returns to the realm of Daoshan.

In the blink of an eye, a hundred years have passed.

this day.

The powerhouses of the Dream Clan found that the River of Dreams had become darker and more unreal.

At one point, the river of dreams dissipated with a thud.

"What's going on?"

One by one, the invincible domain ancestors of the dream clan appeared, several peerless domain ancestors also appeared, and even the dream ancestor of the dream clan also appeared.

"I've seen the Dream Ancestor!"

"I've seen the Dream Ancestor!"

"I've seen the Dream Ancestor!"

A domain ancestor said respectfully.

"Why is the River of Dreams gone?"

The Dream Ancestor was furious.

The River of Dreams is the foundation of the Dream Clan, and without the sacred artifact of the River of Dreams, the development of the Dream Clan will be many times slower.

The disappearance of the Dream River is too serious for the Dream Clan.

"Dream Ancestor, we don't know, the River of Dreams is suddenly gone!"

An Invincible Domain Ancestor reported.

Subsequently, an invincible domain ancestor evolved a scene he had seen.

Through an evolutionary scene, the Dream Clan knew that such a thing had happened to the Dream River suddenly, and no one had touched the Dream River.

Because the Dream Realm has just ended, the energy consumption is relatively large, and during this period of time, the Dream River needs to recover its energy, so even the domain ancestors who have been in retreat in the Dream River for a long time have come out.

No one has entered the River of Dreams recently, how can there be a problem with the River of Dreams?

"Investigate the last batch of geniuses who have entered the fantasy realm, investigate at all costs, all the objects of suspicion, if anything happens, I will vouch for it!"

As the Ancestor, he was not afraid of offending the Holy Clan of Destruction.

Just interrogating the younger generation of the Destruction Holy Clan, he still has the qualifications.

As for the other evil clans, he didn't care even more, could it be that the geniuses of those evil clans still dared to resist him, the ancestor?

Soon, the last batch of 1,000 geniuses who entered the Fantasy Realm were interrogated one by one, and even one by one by the Fantasy Ancestor performed the illusion holy technique, and one by one they were forced to tell what they had done in the Fantasy Realm.

was cast by the ancestor to use the illusion holy technique, and these domain ancestors naturally couldn't resist, and they said it truthfully one by one.

Although some domain ancestors had some small actions, they would not pose any threat to the Dream River, and they all got rid of their involvement.

One person, however, has not yet been interrogated.

"The Ancestor of Dreams, the Son of the Demon Prison Clan's Dead Universe is not in the Demon Prison Clan, he left the Demon Prison Clan not long after he left the Dream Realm, and it is said that he has left the Dark Destruction Domain, and he doesn't know where to go!"

A Supreme Domain Ancestor of the Dream Clan reported.

"The Son of the Dead Universe!"

The Dream Ancestor began to doubt the Son of the Dead Universe.

Moreover, according to the information learned, the Dead Universe Holy Son created his own Superior Domain Ancestral Method, and if there was something wrong with the Dream River, the Dead Universe Saint Son was the most suspicious.

What's more, the Immortal Saint Son created his own Superior Domain Ancestral Method, and it stands to reason that he should retreat and cultivate the Domain Ancestral Method in a short period of time, and he should not run around in the first place, or even leave the Dark Destruction Domain, which is too suspicious.

Therefore, the concept of the Dream Ancestor is ninety percent that the disappearance of the Dream River is related to the Son of the Dead Universe.

Even, the Son of the Dead took the River of Dreams.

What is not clear to the outside world is that although the Dream Clan is in charge of the Dream River, they have not actually refined the Dream River at all, and even he, the ancestor, cannot refine the Dream River.

It's incredible, but it's true.

Because of this, the Dream Ancestor felt that the Dream River was not simple.

"The Holy Son of the Dead Universe must have refined and taken away the holy artifact of the River of Dreams, so he escaped from the Demon Hell Clan. "

The Dream Ancestor guessed.

It's normal, and if it were him, he'd do the same.

Once there is a holy artifact of the Dream River, and it is refined by oneself, it will inevitably grow up with the help of the Dream River in the future, not to mention becoming an ancestor, it should not be difficult to become a superior domain ancestor.

"Damn the Holy Son of the Dead Universe, he has actually broken the foundation of our Dream Clan!"

"The order is issued, hunt down and kill the Dead Yu Holy Son, and suppress the Demon Hell Clan for me!"

The Dream Ancestor commanded.

If it weren't for the existence of the Destruction Saint Clan, he would probably want to destroy the Demon Hell Clan.

However, not long after, the Wind Demon Domain Ancestor of the Demon Prison Clan was assassinated.

All the demons speculated that the Dream Clan was responsible, but there was no evidence.

I have to say that this time the Demon Prison Clan was miserable by Ye Tiankeng.

And the Dream Clan still doesn't know that the so-called Dead Saint Son is fake at all, otherwise they will be so angry that they vomit blood.

In the blink of an eye, 20 million years have passed.

Ye Tian flew for so long before he finally arrived at the Daoshan Realm.
